reviews.review_description: I already tried the app before. Then is had a timer which allowed you only 120 seconds before you had to restart or quit. The timer is gone now, but there is nothing to do or see in the game. You are on a lake and there are a couple of other kayakers and some paddleboarders doing theirs rounds and that is it. The horizon is jittery on my Quest 3 and if you reach the shore, the trees are floating or just in the water or the graphics are flat. It had no entertainment at all, just a bit of paddling with low quality graphics. The water ripples through the bottom of the canoe every few strokes. This game is too expensive for what it offers.

I really enjoy kayaking and paddle around for 5-10 minutes at a time. The graphics are pretty terrible, and you really have to use your imagination.  It would be nice if the scenery changed up some every now and then. Different lakes, different seasons, day/evening, stuff like that. Also I don't think we need the 2 minute timer. Just let us get in the kayak and go.
This kayak experience is very realistic and relaxed me as I paddled over a lake with nice scenery. Thanks!

Please remove the time remaining as it distracts from the beautiful scenery.  Hoping updates and other choices are forthcoming as updates.  I really love it but needs more, too short of time to paddle and enjoy!  Thanks

The idea is great.  When it's up to par it will be great. 
1. A strange light flash every 10-15 seconds. 
2. It ends in 90 seconds, and then you need to restart.
3. Love the concept.

Not downloading need authorization for the app
Need entitlement to download the app

developer_response.body:
Hello jjaanet1,
Sorry for the inconvenience. Please update to the latest version of the app and try again.

reviews.review_description: I need a code or something. I looked for an update can’t find it.
